message.content:
@startuml
actor Teams
boundary API
control BuildService
control CommandParser
control BuildCommand
control BuildSystem
control BuildFactory
database BuildDb
control BuildMonitor
control NotificationService
database NotificationDb

Teams -> API : /api/messages
activate API

API -> BuildService : ProcessCommandAsync
activate BuildService

BuildService -> CommandParser : ParseCommand
activate CommandParser
CommandParser --> BuildService : BuildCommand
deactivate CommandParser

BuildService -> BuildCommand : Execute
activate BuildCommand

BuildCommand -> BuildSystem : CreateBuildAsync
activate BuildSystem

box "BuildSystem Library"
BuildSystem -> BuildFactory : CreateBuildAsync
activate BuildFactory

BuildFactory -> BuildDb : Save build
activate BuildDb
BuildDb --> BuildFactory : Build
deactivate BuildDb

BuildFactory -> BuildMonitor : AddBuildAsync
activate BuildMonitor
BuildMonitor --> BuildFactory
deactivate BuildMonitor
deactivate BuildFactory
end box

BuildSystem --> BuildCommand : Build
deactivate BuildSystem

BuildCommand -> NotificationService : AddNotificationAsync
activate NotificationService
NotificationService -> NotificationDb : Save notification
activate NotificationDb
NotificationDb --> NotificationService
deactivate NotificationDb
NotificationService --> BuildCommand
deactivate NotificationService

BuildCommand --> BuildService
deactivate BuildCommand

BuildService --> API
deactivate BuildService

API --> Teams
deactivate API

@enduml
